title: Adler-32 checksum (RFC 1950)
signature: pub fn adler32(seed: u32, buf: &[u8]) -> u32
notes: BASE = 65521 (largest prime < 2^16). NMAX = 5552 bytes before modulo. Initial seed is 1 for a fresh checksum. Output is packed as (s2 << 16) | s1 where s1 = seed & 0xFFFF and s2 = (seed >> 16) & 0xFFFF before accumulation.
